task: I’m trying to choose a bar-catering company for a future private event in the Minneapolis area, and Steady Pour is one of the vendors I want seriously evaluated rather than just looked up in isolation. Please start with Steady Pour’s public site, pull every bar-catering or home-bar service option you can find, and record the listed pricing if it’s published; if a price is missing, mark it clearly as not shown instead of guessing. Then broaden this into a real comparison by finding 7 other Minneapolis-area mobile bar or bar-catering companies with public pages, so we end up with exactly 8 total vendors including Steady Pour. For each vendor, use only public pages to capture the core offering types, whether alcohol is included or BYO, staffing or bartender details if shown, minimum guest count or event minimum if shown, service area, pricing or starting price if shown, and any obvious extras like mixers, glassware, mocktails, coffee cart, trailer bar, or dry hire options; use not shown wherever the site does not publish something. As you work, keep the strongest evidence visible by opening the main service or pricing page for all 8 vendors, and also open photo, gallery, or social-proof pages for at least 4 of them so I can visually compare presentation quality. Compare the vendors for two realistic use cases: a budget-conscious casual party and a more polished wedding-style event, and tell me which vendors look strongest for each case based only on what their public pages support. At the end, give me one organized comparison with all 8 vendors, call out where Steady Pour stands on pricing transparency and service fit versus the others, recommend a top 3 shortlist, and leave the most useful service/pricing tabs open for Steady Pour plus the two best alternatives.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully identified Steady Pour and 7 other Minneapolis-area mobile bar/bar-catering vendors: One More Bartending, MinnyBar, The Minnesocial, LiquidMotion, Bootleg Blondie, Piccadilly Pours, and Hitch & Sip. The final comparison table in the agent's response includes all 8 of these vendors, satisfying the requirement for exactly 8 total vendors.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to Steady Pour's website, specifically the "Bar Catering" and "Private Dining" pages. It identified the service options (all-inclusive, hosted/semi-hosted, cash bar, client-provided alcohol, signature cocktails, and fancy finishings). It correctly identified that specific pricing for these services is not published on the site, noting "not shown" in its final comparison table for Steady Pour's bar catering pricing. The agent's actions and final report demonstrate that it thoroughly inspected the site to capture these details as required by the rubric.

R3: success - The agent successfully identified 8 vendors (Steady Pour, One More Bartending, MinnyBar, The Minnesocial, LiquidMotion, Bootleg Blondie, Piccadilly Pours, and Hitch & Sip). It created a comparison table that includes all the required fields: core offering types, alcohol/BYO status, staffing details, minimums, service area, pricing, and extras. For fields where information was not available on the public pages (such as specific pricing for several vendors), the agent correctly used "not shown" or explicitly stated that pricing was not published, rather than inferring or guessing. The table is comprehensive and covers all 8 vendors as requested.

R4: failure - The rubric requires the browser session to keep open the main service or pricing page for all 8 vendors, plus photo, gallery, or social-proof pages for at least 4 of them. 

Reviewing the final state of the browser (Step 52):
- The agent closed almost all tabs, leaving only 4 tabs open:
    1. Steady Pour Bar Catering
    2. Steady Pour Private Dining
    3. LiquidMotion
    4. Piccadilly Pours Packages
- The agent failed to keep open the service/pricing pages for the other 4 vendors (One More Bartending, MinnyBar, The Minnesocial, Bootleg Blondie, Hitch & Sip).
- The agent also failed to keep open any photo, gallery, or social-proof pages for the required 4 vendors.

The agent explicitly closed the tabs in Step 51 and 52, violating the requirement to keep them open for the user's final review.

R5: success - The agent provided a comprehensive comparison table for all 8 vendors. In the final synthesis, it explicitly addressed the two requested use cases: "budget-conscious casual party" and "polished wedding-style event." For the budget-conscious case, it recommended vendors like One More Bartending and Piccadilly Pours due to their dry-hire models and transparent pricing. For the polished wedding-style event, it recommended LiquidMotion and Steady Pour for their professional, all-inclusive, and high-end service capabilities. The comparison clearly explains which vendors fit each scenario based on the evidence gathered from their public pages.

R6: success - The agent successfully identified a top 3 shortlist (Piccadilly Pours, LiquidMotion, and Steady Pour) and provided a comparison table. In the final response, the agent explicitly addresses Steady Pour's pricing transparency, noting it is "not shown" for bar catering, and positions it against competitors by highlighting that while others (like Piccadilly Pours) offer transparent package pricing, Steady Pour relies on custom quotes. The agent also discusses service fit, noting Steady Pour's unique "fancy finishings" and onsite venue options compared to the mobile-only focus of the other vendors. The requirement to identify a top 3 and position Steady Pour on transparency and fit is satisfied.

R7: success - The agent was tasked with leaving the most useful service/pricing tabs open for Steady Pour and the two best alternative vendors. In the final step (52), the agent confirmed the following tabs were left open:
1. Steady Pour Bar Catering (https://www.steadypour.com/bar-catering)
2. Steady Pour Private Dining (https://www.steadypour.com/private-dining)
3. LiquidMotion (https://www.4liquidmotion.com/)
4. Piccadilly Pours Packages (https://www.piccadillypours.com/packages)

This satisfies the requirement to keep the key service/pricing tabs open for Steady Pour and the two best alternatives (LiquidMotion and Piccadilly Pours were identified as the top alternatives in the agent's final comparison).
